scripts.preinstall: sh -c 'rm -f package-lock.json yarn.lock; case "$npm_config_user_agent" in pnpm/*) ;; *) echo "Use pnpm instead" >&2; exit 1 ;; esac'
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
scripts.typecheck:all: concurrently 'tsc -p lib/db/tsconfig.json --noEmit' 'tsc -p lib/i18n/tsconfig.json --noEmit' 'tsc -p lib/auth-utils/tsconfig.json --noEmit' 'tsc -p lib/auth-react/tsconfig.json --noEmit' 'tsc -p lib/api-client-react/tsconfig.json --noEmit' 'tsc -p artifacts/api-server/tsconfig.json --noEmit' 'tsc -p artifacts/admin/tsconfig.json --noEmit' 'tsc -p artifacts/rider-app/tsconfig.json --noEmit' 'tsc -p artifacts/vendor-app/tsconfig.json --noEmit'
scripts.typecheck:ci: concurrently --max-processes 6 --names db,i18n,auth-utils,auth-react,api-client,api,admin,rider,vendor 'tsc -p lib/db/tsconfig.json --noEmit' 'tsc -p lib/i18n/tsconfig.json --noEmit' 'tsc -p lib/auth-utils/tsconfig.json --noEmit' 'tsc -p lib/auth-react/tsconfig.json --noEmit' 'tsc -p lib/api-client-react/tsconfig.json --noEmit' 'tsc -p artifacts/api-server/tsconfig.json --noEmit' 'tsc -p artifacts/admin/tsconfig.json --noEmit' 'tsc -p artifacts/rider-app/tsconfig.json --noEmit' 'tsc -p artifacts/vendor-app/tsconfig.json --noEmit'
scripts.lint:ci: concurrently --max-processes 5 --names api,admin,rider,vendor,lib "eslint artifacts/api-server/src --max-warnings 0 --cache --cache-location .eslintcache" "eslint artifacts/admin/src --max-warnings 0 --cache --cache-location .eslintcache" "eslint artifacts/rider-app/src --max-warnings 0 --cache --cache-location .eslintcache" "eslint artifacts/vendor-app/src --max-warnings 0 --cache --cache-location .eslintcache" "eslint lib --max-warnings 0 --cache --cache-location .eslintcache"
